message:
✨ Add dedicated Copilot build monitor workflow

Separate workflow for reliability - handles:
- Netlify build failures on Copilot PRs
- Auto DCO override on new commits
- Notify @Copilot to fix build errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
